laHarpar.title: La Harpar Discovered!
laHarpar.body: A bustling port town lies nearby. The Map tab is now available — use it to travel there. Once inside, visit the Tavern for rumors, browse the Market for supplies, and seek out the Exploration Guild for bounty tasks.

plains.title: New Area: The Plains
plains.body: Beyond the beach stretches open grassland. Strange slimes roam the fields — and something much larger lurks at wave 10. Survive long enough to face the boss.

crafting.title: Crafting Unlocked!
crafting.body: You've found a turtle shell — sturdy enough to forge into real gear. The Crafting tab is now available. Combine the materials you've gathered to craft powerful equipment.

skillTree.title: Level Up! Skill Tree Unlocked
skillTree.body: You've grown stronger. The Skill Tree tab is now available — spend your skill points to unlock passive bonuses and sharpen your fighting style.
